name: sf-skills
description: Salesforce development skills for Codex, Claude Code, and other agentic coding tools.

interface.longDescription: A hybrid skills and plugin repository for Salesforce-focused coding agents, with reusable sf-* skills at the core and Claude Code compatibility tooling kept under extras/claude-code.
